term: 风更大了, 船身颠簸起来。 Fēng gèng dà le, chuánshēn diānbǒ qǐlai.

description: I'll catch up with you no matter how fast you run.
term: 凭你跑多快, 我也赶得上。píng nǐ pǎo duō kuài, wǒ yě gǎn de shàng.

description: pernicious malaria
term: 恶性疟疾 èxìng nüèji

description: Let's leave the matter to her.
term: 这事就托给她吧。 Zhè shì jiù tuō gěi tā ba. I'd like you to take something to him.

description: Don't just think of yourself.
term: 你别只顾自己。 Nǐ bié zhǐ gù zìjǐ. You've got so many things to attend to. Can you manage all by yourself? 这么多事你一个人顾得过来吗？ Zhème duō shì nǐ yī ge rén gù de guòlai ma？

description: The doctor immediately attended to the emergency case without stopping for a meal.
term: 医生顾不得吃饭就去抢救病人。 Yīshēng gù bude chīfàn jiù qù qiǎngjiù bìngrén.

description: This is a very solid table.
term: 这张桌子很结实。 Zhè zhāng zhuōzi hěn jiēshi.

description: Tie it fast.
term: 拴结实点儿。 Shuān jiēshi diǎnr.

description: Paintbrush
term: 油漆刷yóuqī shuā

description: brush shoes
term: 刷鞋shuā xié

description: scrub the floor
term: 刷地板 shuā dìbǎn

description: paste up posters

description: That team was not eliminated until the semifinals.

description: He and his brother had contrary points of view on politics.

description: Far from being best friends, they are bitter enemies.

description: regardless (or irrespective) of sex and age
term: 不论性别年龄 bùlùn xìngbié niánlíng Whether he comes or not, we'll have to do it.

term: 语言是人们交际的工具。 Yǔyán shì rénmen jiāojì de gōngjù.

description: She has a large circle of acquaintances.

description: She is very good at socializing (or is a good mixer) and knows quite a few people.

description: Don't throw it away; it may come in handy.
term: 不要扔掉, 将来会有用处。 Bùyào rēngdiào, jiānglái huì yǒu yòngchu.

description: rob a bank
term: 抢银行 qiǎng yínháng

description: He snatched away the letter.
term: 他把信抢了过去。 Tā bǎ xìn qiǎng le guòqu.

description: scramble for the ball
term: 抢球 qiǎng qiú

description: The children jostled with each other for the first place in line.
term: 孩子们抢着要排第一个。 Háizi men qiǎng zhe yào pái dì-yī ge.

description: sharpen kitchen knives
term: 抢菜刀 qiǎng càidāo

description: a touching story

description: herd the sheep into the pens
term: 把羊群圈起来 bǎ yángqún juān qǐlai

description: Don't shut yourself up in your study.
term: 别老圈在书房里。 Bié lǎo juān zài shūfáng lǐ.

description: The prisoners were locked up.
term: 犯人都圈起来了。 Fànrén dōu juān qǐlai le.

description: controversies over differing opinions

description: a heated dispute
term: 激烈的争论 jīliè de zhēnglùn

description: the point at issue
term: 争论之点 zhēnglùn zhī diǎn

term: 虚心体察情况 xūxīn tǐchá qíngkuàng

term: 哪怕天气不好也要去。nǎpà tiānqì bù hǎo yě yào qù.

term: 宽肩膀 kuān jiānbǎng

term: 这次访华, 大开宽。 Zhècì fǎngHuá, dà kāi kuān.

term: 这条河有一里宽。 Zhè tiáo hé yǒu yī lǐ kuān.

term: 每棵树苗要隔开五米。 Měi kē shùmiáo yào gé kāi wǔ mǐ.

term: 爱克斯光能透过肌体检查病变。 Àikèsīguāng néng tòu guò jītǐ jiǎnchá bìngbiàn.

term: 血从绷带里透了出来。 Xuè cóng bēngdài lǐ tòu le chūlai.

description: These shoes are waterproof.
term: 这双鞋不透水。 Zhè shuāng xié bù tòu shuǐ.

term: 只听他透了一句半句的, 详细情况还不清楚。 Zhǐ tīng tā tòu le yī jù bàn jù de, xiángxì qíngkuàng hái bù qīngchu.

description: Little was revealed about the talks.
term: 这次谈判, 一点情况也没透出来。 Zhè cì tánpàn, yīdiǎn qíngkuàng yě méi tòu chū lái.

description: I was stupid enough to have failed the first test.

description: be in a terrible fury
term: 火透了 Huǒ tòu le

term: 对问题了解得很透duì wèntí liǎojiě de hěn tòu

term: 这部机器是模仿上海的一种新产品制造的。 Zhè bù jīqì shì mófǎng Shànghǎi de yī zhǒng xīn chǎnpǐn zhìzào de.

term: 给敲去五块钱 gěi qiāo qù wǔ kuài qián

description: talk too much; be a regular chatterbox
term: 嘴太碎 zuǐ tài suì

term: 给我约一公斤猪肉。 Gěi wǒ yāo yī gōngjīn zhūròu.

description: See how much it weighs.
term: 约约多重。yāo yāo duō zhòng.

description: I've had nothing to do for the last couple of days.
term: 我这两天闲着没事。 Wǒ zhè liǎng tiān ∼xián zhe méi shì.

term: 妈妈老是这么忙, 没闲过一天。 Māma lǎo shì zhème máng, méi xián guò yī tiān.

description: This is a light wine.

description: poor land
term: 薄地 báo dì

description: It's been almost ten days since he left.
term: 他走了恐怕有十来天了。 Tā zǒu le kǒngpà yǒu shí lái tiān le.

description: I'm afraid he won't agree.
term: 恐怕他不会同意。kǒngpà tā bù huì tóngyì.

description: sit by the window
term: 挨着窗口坐āi zhe chuāngkǒu zuò

term: 那两家铺子紧挨着。 Nà liǎng jiā pùzi jǐn āi zhe. Don't push. Go in one by one.

description: It isn't my turn yet, is it?
term: 还没挨到我吧？ Hái méi āi dào wǒ ba？

term: 博物馆从上午九点到下午五点接待观众。 Bówùguǎn cóng shàngwǔ jiǔ diǎn dào xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn jiēdài guānzhòng.

description: Please ask him to come.
term: 请约他来。 Qǐng yuē tā lái.

term: 今天买卖怎么样? Jīntiān mǎimai zěnmeyàng？

description: make reservations for seats in a restaurant, theatre, etc.

term: 逗孩子玩 dòu háizi wán

description: You're kidding!
term: 别逗了。 Bié dòu le.
